help.credit: [PL] Credit: Amounts we owe (decrease in assets or increase in liabilities)

help.debit: [PL] Debit: Amounts owed to us (increase in assets or decrease in liabilities)
help.debitTotal: [PL] Total Debit: Sum of all debit amounts in the period

componentLab.description: Testowanie i podgląd wszystkich popup-ów i komponentów

info.description: To laboratorium pozwala testować i podglądać wszystkie dostępne popup-y, dialogi i komponenty. Kliknij 'Otwórz' na dowolnym komponencie, aby zobaczyć go w działaniu.
info.title: O Laboratorium Komponentów

accountDetailsSheet.description: Kompleksowe szczegóły konta z księgą i transakcjami (Stara wersja z danymi testowymi)

agentDetailsSheet.name: Arkusz Szczegółów Agenta

fundTransferDialog.description: Transfer środków między kontami i bankami

invoiceDetailSheet.description: [PL] Detailed view of an invoice with items, totals, and payment information
invoiceDetailSheet.name: [PL] Invoice Detail Sheet

journalEntryDetailSheet.description: [PL] Detailed view of a journal entry with all lines and accounting information
journalEntryDetailSheet.name: [PL] Journal Entry Detail Sheet

ledgerTable.description: [PL] Enhanced version of NexaTable with advanced filters, stat cards, quick date filters, and automatic financial number coloring
ledgerTable.name: [PL] Enhanced Ledger Table

newJournalEntrySheet.name: Arkusz Nowego Zapisu Księgowego

nexaGrid.description: [PL] Canvas-based grid with Excel-like speed - supports millions of rows, marker, export, print, and amount in words
nexaGrid.name: [PL] 🚀 NexaGrid - High Performance

nexaTable.description: [PL] Unified table component with sorting, filtering, selection, and serial numbers
nexaTable.name: [PL] Nexa Table

nexaTableV2.description: [PL] Advanced table with TanStack Table - supports column resizing, search, filtering, export, and virtualization for large datasets
nexaTableV2.name: [PL] Advanced NexaTable V2

paymentDetailSheet.description: [PL] Detailed view of a payment or receipt voucher with accounting entries
paymentDetailSheet.name: [PL] Payment Detail Sheet

registerPage.description: [PL] Basic registration page for new users with multilingual support and RTL
registerPage.name: [PL] Register Page

registrationWizard.description: [PL] Multi-step wizard shown after registration to complete account setup (business type, company info, financial settings)
registrationWizard.name: [PL] Registration Wizard

saasDetailSheet.description: [PL] Unified sheet for all SaaS entities (Plans, Tenants, Agents, Modules) - with 6 tabs for Plans
saasDetailSheet.name: [PL] SaaS Detail Sheet (Production)

simplePlanSheet.description: [PL] Simple stable sheet without focus loop - for production use
simplePlanSheet.name: [PL] Simple Plan Sheet (Production)

unifiedModal.description: Centralne okno dialogowe dla formularzy i potwierdzeń
unifiedModal.name: Ujednolicone Okno Modalne

universalDetailSheet.description: [PL] Config-driven unified sheet system - supports Tenants, Agents, Invoices with nested sheets
universalDetailSheet.name: [PL] Universal Detail Sheet
